title: Heritage Month Celebration - Save the Date & Volunteer Callout
content:
Heritage Month Celebration - Sat Oct 24, 2026

Join us at the parish hall for our Heritage Month celebration.

  • Doors open: 12:30 PM
  • Program begins: 4:00 PM
  • Cultural food, music, and community.

All are welcome. Please RSVP through the Eventbrite link on the parish site.

Rosa Hamilton, Music Committee
excerpt: Heritage Month Oct 24 - doors 12:30 PM, program 4:00 PM. Volunteers still needed.

title: Sunday Bulletin - October 4, 2026
content:
Mass schedule

Sat vigil 5:00 PM; Sun 9:00 AM, 11:00 AM, 1:00 PM (Spanish).

Announcements

Heritage Month planning meeting Wed 7:00 PM in the hall.
excerpt: Mass schedule and Heritage Month planning meeting.

title: Sunday Bulletin - September 27, 2026
content:
Q3 offertory thanks

Thank you for your generous giving. Building fund holds steady.

title: Sunday Bulletin - September 20, 2026
content:
Notices

ESOL fall classes now taking sign-ups. See the parish office.

title: A Letter from Fr. Donovan - Heritage Month
content: Dear parish family, Heritage Month reminds us of the many cultures that make up our community. I ask that we welcome all our neighbors on Oct 24. Peace, Fr. Michael Donovan.
excerpt: Fr. Donovan's letter on Heritage Month.
